response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering expertise and geospatial experience (GISCollective), but lacks direct experience with modern C++ or Rust for routing/navigation systems. His background in distributed systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby) and performance optimization (low-latency apps in Dlang) is relevant, though not in the exact domain. His focus on web/mobile stacks may not align closely enough with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data processing (GISCollective platform)
Strong background in distributed systems and performance optimization
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly and contribute across full stacks
concerns: No demonstrated experience with modern C++ or Rust (primary technologies required)
Limited exposure to navigation/routing systems or real-time traffic integration
Most recent work focuses on web/mobile stacks rather than low-latency data pipelines
